memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint8_t fc, uint16_t addr, uint16_t count, const uint16_t *write_vals)
memberdef.name: send_request

parameterdescription.para: Optional array of write values for FC 0x10.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint16_t start_addr, uint16_t count)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_master_read_holding

briefdescription.para: Issue a Read Holding Registers (FC 0x03) request.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint16_t start_addr, uint16_t count)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_master_read_input

briefdescription.para: Issue a Read Input Registers (FC 0x04) request.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint16_t reg_addr, uint16_t value)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_master_write_single

briefdescription.para: Issue a Write Single Register (FC 0x06) request.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint16_t start_addr, uint16_t count, const uint16_t *values)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_master_write_multiple

briefdescription.para: Issue a Write Multiple Registers (FC 0x10) request.

parameterdescription.para: Array of register values to write.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint16_t start_addr, uint16_t count)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_master_read_coils

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint16_t start_addr, uint16_t count)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_master_read_discrete_inputs

briefdescription.para: Issue a Read Discrete Inputs (FC 0x02) request.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint16_t coil_addr, bool state)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_master_write_single_coil

briefdescription.para: Issue a Write Single Coil (FC 0x05) request.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint16_t start_addr, uint16_t count, const uint8_t *coil_bytes)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_master_write_multiple_coils

briefdescription.para: Issue a Write Multiple Coils (FC 0x0F) request.

parameterdescription.para: Packed byte array containing coil states.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ModbusMaster *m, uint8_t slave_addr, uint16_t reg_addr, uint16_t and_mask, uint16_t or_mask)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_master_mask_write_register

briefdescription.para: Issue a Mask Write Register (FC 0x16) request.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

briefdescription.para: Issue a Read FIFO Queue (FC 0x18) request.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

briefdescription.para: Issue a Report Server ID (FC 0x11) request.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if transaction in progress.

briefdescription.para: Feed a received byte into the Master RX stream buffer.
Non-blocking Modbus RTU Master protocol implementation.
